title: Recursive Attention Loop — Causality Validation (Public Data)
honestyBoundary: A full causal closure around the entire cycle in one apparatus is not yet demonstrated.
methodology: Causality is assessed by comparing held-out actual observations to modelled transfer predictions. A hop is supported when the causal model beats mean-null and sham (permuted-cause) baselines on actuals. This is the required standard.

actual_vs_modelled.interpretation: Transfer model does not beat persistence/sham on held-out actuals.

segments.interpretation: Transfer model: Kp from lagged SSN vs held-out daily Kp actuals.

actual_vs_modelled.interpretation: Transfer model does not beat persistence/sham on walk-forward actuals.

segments.interpretation: Transfer model: movement from lagged Kp vs GPS collar actuals (herbivore proxy).

actual_vs_modelled.interpretation: Nested AR+cause model beats persistence and sham circular-shift on walk-forward actuals.

segments.interpretation: Transfer model: commits from lagged SSN vs weekly commit actuals (studio proxy).

ssn_to_kp.interpretation: Transfer model does not beat persistence/sham on walk-forward actuals.

kp_to_movement.interpretation: Transfer model does not beat persistence/sham on walk-forward actuals.

segments.interpretation: Each chain link tested: modelled transfer vs held-out actuals.

segments.hop: quantum_hydrogen + DNA + silicon (structural actual vs modelled)

actual_vs_modelled.notes: QED RMS 0.210 cm-1; Phi correction does not improve chi-squared (egs-nlrf).
AC-HMM beats baselines on capped spatial CV (ac-hmm-satellites).

actual_vs_modelled.actual: GPU telemetry PCS from reference traces
actual_vs_modelled.null_baseline: raw PCS baseline (0.5) and stream-ablated path
actual_vs_modelled.notes: Full PCS 0.175 vs raw 0.5; ablation restores null-level error (eesm-gpu-telemetry).

segments.interpretation: Each repo compares model predictions to measured actuals; null is weaker baseline.

closureVerdict.methodology: Causality is assessed by comparing held-out actual observations to modelled transfer predictions. A hop is supported when the causal model beats mean-null and sham (permuted-cause) baselines on actuals. This is the required standard.
closureVerdict.statement: A full causal closure around the entire cycle in one apparatus is not yet demonstrated.
